title: Now that we draw
description:
Uehara-kun loves drawing 2-dimensional characters and his desire is to become a manga artist. However, his dreams are dashed when an editor rejects his work as too boring.
The next day while contemplating giving up on his dream, a gal in his class named Miyamoto Niina, sees his manuscript and starts a pseudo-romance with him that's a little too close to comfort, in order to help him with his manga. A manga artist x adolescent love comedy.
